headline: Halliburton Wins Integrated Drilling and Completions Contracts for Granmorgu Deepwater Project Offshore Suriname, Operated by Totalenergies
summary: HOUSTON, July 13, 2026--Halliburton (NYSE: HAL) wins major integrated well construction contracts for the GranMorgu deepwater development offshore Suriname, operated by TotalEnergies. The agreement includes drilling and completions services for a long-term program. Halliburton will deploy a fully integrated, digital and automation execution model that unites planning, engineering, and operations to improve performance, accelerate learning, and reduce total cost of ownership throughout well const

headline: Nuclear Innovator Deep Isolation Begins Trading on the OTCQB Venture Market Under the Ticker Symbol “DBHL”
summary: Deep Isolation Nuclear Trading under DBHL on the OTCQB BERKELEY, Calif., July 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Deep Isolation Nuclear, Inc. (“Deep Isolation” or the “Company”), a leading innovator in nuclear waste disposal technology, today announced that its application for listing its common stock for trading on the OTCQB Venture Market has been approved. The Company’s common stock is now available to trade under the ticker symbol “DBHL”. “We are excited to begin trading on the OTCQB, offering pub
